name: bettercallclaude
description: Swiss Legal Intelligence -- BGE/ATF/DTF precedent research, case strategy, legal drafting, and citation verification across all 26 Swiss cantons with Anwaltsgeheimnis privacy protection.

mcp_base_url.title: Hosted MCP gateway URL
mcp_base_url.description: Base URL for the BetterCallClaude hosted MCP gateway (entscheidsuche, bge-search, legal-citations, fedlex-sparql, onlinekommentar). Override this if you self-host the stack.

caselaw_base_url.title: Swiss caselaw MCP URL
caselaw_base_url.description: Base URL for the swiss-caselaw SSE MCP endpoint.

ollama_host.title: Ollama host URL
ollama_host.description: URL of the Ollama host used by the bundled ollama MCP server for local-only translation and summarisation.

default_jurisdiction.title: Default Swiss canton
default_jurisdiction.description: Default Swiss canton code for cantonal research (e.g. ZH, BE, GE, TI, VD). Leave blank for federal-only queries.

output_language.title: Output language
output_language.description: Preferred output language for agents and drafter output. One of: DE, FR, IT, EN.

api_token.title: MCP gateway API token (optional)
api_token.description: Optional bearer token for accessing a protected BetterCallClaude MCP deployment. Leave blank for the public service.
